creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-04-11 22:26:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/fusefs-s3fs Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
  Log:
  FUSE-based file system backed by Amazon S3. Mount a bucket as a local
  file system read/write. Store files/folders natively and
  transparently.
  
  WWW:    http://code.google.com/p/s3fs/
  
  PR:             ports/133607
  Submitted by:   Gea-Suan Lin <gslin at gslin.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1096    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +34 -0     ports/sysutils/fusefs-s3fs/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/fusefs-s3fs/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/fusefs-s3fs/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/sysutils/fusefs-s3fs/pkg-message (new)
